@graph.name: TOXFREE® LSZH N2XH flex
@graph.description: Flexible LSZH power cable for public places. ACCORDING TO: IEC 60502-1. BASED ON: VDE 0276-604. TOXFREE® LSZH N2XH flex is a LSZH cable for fixed installations, highly recommended for use in public places. This cable is also available in its variants N2XH-J and N2XH-O.
@graph.category: Hardware > Building Materials > Wiring & Cables > Electrical Cables

audience.audienceType: Electrical Distributors, Electrical Installers, Engineers (Public Buildings & Hospitals), Engineers (Industrial Projects), Data Centre Operators, Data Centre Design Consultants, Data Centre Contractors, Data Centre Installers

subjectOf.name: Technical Datasheet - TOXFREE® LSZH N2XH flex
subjectOf.description: Complete technical specifications, engineering data and certifications for the cable.

additionalProperty.name: Conductor
additionalProperty.value: Copper, class 5 (flexible) according to EN 60228 and IEC 60228

additionalProperty.name: Insulation
additionalProperty.value: Cross-linked polyethylene (XLPE), type XLPE according to IEC 60502-1 and type 2XI1 according to VDE 0276-604

additionalProperty.name: Outer Sheath
additionalProperty.value: Low smoke halogen free polyolefin, type ST8 according to IEC 60502-1 and type HM4 according to VDE 0276-604. Black colour

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Service Temperature
additionalProperty.value: -40 (fixed and protected installations)

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Installation Temperature
additionalProperty.value: 0 (on cable surface)

additionalProperty.name: Flame Non-Propagation
additionalProperty.value: Flame non-propagation according to EN 60332-1 and IEC 60332-1

additionalProperty.name: Fire Non-Propagation
additionalProperty.value: Fire non-propagation according to EN 60332-3-24 and IEC 60332-3-24 and EN 50399

additionalProperty.name: CPR Classification
additionalProperty.value: B2ca-s1a,d1,a1 or Cca-s1a,d1,a1 (according to cross-section) according to EN 50575

additionalProperty.name: Halogen Free
additionalProperty.value: Halogen free according to EN 60754-1 and IEC 60754-1

additionalProperty.name: Low Corrosive Gases Emission
additionalProperty.value: Low corrosive gases emission according to EN 60754-2 and IEC 60754-2

additionalProperty.name: Low Smoke Emission
additionalProperty.value: Low smoke emission according to EN 61034 and IEC 61034

additionalProperty.name: Light Transmittance
additionalProperty.value: Light transmittance > 80%

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Bending Radius
additionalProperty.value: 5x cable diameter

additionalProperty.name: Impact Resistance
additionalProperty.value: AG2 Medium severity

additionalProperty.name: Chemical & Oil Resistance
additionalProperty.value: Acceptable

additionalProperty.name: UV Resistance
additionalProperty.value: Yes, according to EN 50618

additionalProperty.name: Water Resistance
additionalProperty.value: AD8 Submersion

additionalProperty.name: Installation Conditions
additionalProperty.value: Open air, Buried, In conduit

additionalProperty.name: Standards and Approvals
additionalProperty.value: KEMA-KEUR, RoHS, CE

additionalProperty.name: Typical Applications
additionalProperty.value: High-occupancy buildings, Industrial facilities, Data Centres

additionalProperty.name: European Stock
additionalProperty.value: Largest European Stock Holding

additionalProperty.name: Manufacturing Quality
additionalProperty.value: As cable manufacturers, we ensure cost-effective premium quality and lasting performance.

additionalProperty.name: Quality Testing
additionalProperty.value: Our in-house labs guarantee rigorous cable quality, reliability, and standards compliance.

additionalProperty.name: Global Logistics
additionalProperty.value: Global cable delivery solutions—expert logistics for seamless supply.

additionalProperty.name: Fast Delivery
additionalProperty.value: Full cable stock, ready for fast delivery- shortest lead times.

additionalProperty.name: Sustainability
additionalProperty.value: EPD-certified cables: Sustainable manufacturing for your Scope 3 success.

additionalProperty.name: Customer Service
additionalProperty.value: Expert, friendly and professional sales team offering a fast & efficient customer service. Global customers are welcome!
